items.name: border-beam
items.title: Border Beam
items.description: Animated border beam effect using CSS Houdini @property and conic-gradient. Supports border (sm/md) and line (bottom-only traveling glow) size variants with per-component theme control (dark/light/auto). Refactored from Jakubantalik/border-beam (MIT) into static, registry-native CSS — no runtime style injection, no npm dependency.

items.name: border-beam-button
items.title: Border Beam Button
items.description: shadcn Button pre-wrapped with the border-beam effect. Defaults to beam size 'sm'.

items.name: border-beam-card
items.title: Border Beam Card
items.description: shadcn Card pre-wrapped with the border-beam effect. Defaults to beam size 'md'.

items.name: border-beam-input
items.title: Border Beam Input
items.description: shadcn Input pre-wrapped with the border-beam effect. Defaults to beam size 'sm'.

items.name: border-beam-textarea
items.title: Border Beam Textarea
items.description: shadcn Textarea pre-wrapped with the border-beam effect. Defaults to beam size 'md'.
